storyHook: 突然发现意外，表达惊讶，弄清缘由

narrative.when: 周六下午，甲刚到朋友家门口
narrative.who: 甲（被惊喜的人）· 乙（准备惊喜的朋友们）
narrative.how: 甲推门进去，发现意外的场景
narrative.method: 意外发现场景、追问是怎么回事、听完缘由、笑着接受
narrative.event: 其实是乙提前给甲准备了一个生日惊喜

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh! What is all this?
turns.zh: 哦！这都是什么？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Happy day! Surprise!
turns.zh: 生日快乐！惊喜！

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is this for me? I did not see this coming.
turns.zh: 这是给我的吗？我真没想到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, we put it together for you.
turns.zh: 对，我们为你准备的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: But it is not my day today, is it?
turns.zh: 但今天不是我生日吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is today! You let it slip. Look at the day.
turns.zh: 就是今天！你忘了。看看日期。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, you are right! I am so surprised.
turns.zh: 哦，你说得对！我太惊讶了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We have been working on this for a week.
turns.zh: 我们为这个忙了一周了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How did you keep it secret from me?
turns.zh: 你们怎么瞒住我的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We made a group talk without you.
turns.zh: 我们建了个群，没拉你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I walked past your house every day and saw nothing!
turns.zh: 我每天路过你家，啥也没看出来！

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We got under the curtains when you came near.
turns.zh: 你走近时我们就躲窗帘后面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good idea! I had no idea.
turns.zh: 好主意！我完全没察觉。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We put a sign on the door: 'no laughs'.
turns.zh: 我们在门上贴了‘没乐子’的牌子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You tricked me well. I love it.
turns.zh: 你们把我骗得好。我喜欢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, and we put a cover on the cake box.
turns.zh: 对了，蛋糕盒上还盖了布。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I saw nothing strange when I came in.
turns.zh: 我进来时啥也没觉得奇怪。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We kept the air balls in the back room.
turns.zh: 我们把气球藏在里屋了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That was well done. I am surprised.
turns.zh: 干得漂亮。我很惊喜。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now put out the lights and say what you hope for.
turns.zh: 现在吹灭灯，说出你的愿望。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like more friends like you.
turns.zh: 我希望能有更多你们这样的朋友。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good thought. Now cut the cake.
turns.zh: 好想法。现在切蛋糕吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is it right to give him the things first?
turns.zh: 要不要先把东西给他？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, open this one. It is from all of us.
turns.zh: 好，拆这个吧。是我们一起送的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A book and a pen! How did you see I would like these?
turns.zh: 一本书和一支笔！你怎么看出我想要的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We saw you looking at them in the store last week.
turns.zh: 我们上周看到你在店里看它们了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You have a good eye for what I need.
turns.zh: 你对我需要的东西眼光真准。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good news. Now, what about the cake?
turns.zh: 好消息。现在，蛋糕呢？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have a small bit, not too much.
turns.zh: 我来一小块，别太多。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here you are. Would you like a drink with it?
turns.zh: 给你。要喝点什么吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, some water, please. This is a great get-together.
turns.zh: 好，请来点水。这聚会太棒了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is not done. We have more plays after this.
turns.zh: 还没结束呢。我们之后还有更多游戏。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Play? You have done much work on this.
turns.zh: 游戏？你们为这花了不少功夫。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It was a pleasure. You are our friend.
turns.zh: 我们很乐意。你是我们的朋友。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am happy to have you all. Thank you.
turns.zh: 有你们我很高兴。谢谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, now let us get the cake cut.
turns.zh: 好了，现在咱们切蛋糕吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Did you make this cake with your own hands?
turns.zh: 这蛋糕是你亲手做的吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I did. It is a simple sweet cake.
turns.zh: 对，我做的。就是简单的甜蛋糕。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It looks great. You are a good cook.
turns.zh: 看着很棒。你厨艺真好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. I was happy to do it.
turns.zh: 谢谢。我很乐意做这个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would not have thought you had the time for this.
turns.zh: 我真没想到你还有时间弄这个。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We made time. It was a secret.
turns.zh: 我们挤出来的时间。这是个秘密。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How did you keep it from me?
turns.zh: 你们怎么瞒着我？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We started the chat without you.
turns.zh: 我们没等你就开始聊了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good idea. I am surprised.
turns.zh: 真是个好主意。我挺意外的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You almost saw us, but we kept away.
turns.zh: 你差点发现我们，但我们躲开了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: When was that? I saw nothing.
turns.zh: 什么时候？我什么都没看见。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You came to the door last week on day two.
turns.zh: 上周二你来过门口。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I do not keep a record of every day.
turns.zh: 我哪记得每天的事。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So that is why we did it. Happy day.
turns.zh: 所以我们才这么干。快乐的日子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I still do not get how you did it.
turns.zh: 我还是没搞懂你们怎么做到的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We kept a secret for weeks.
turns.zh: 我们保密了好几周。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Did you get all these things in one go?
turns.zh: 这些东西是一次性搞来的吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, bit by bit, so no one would see.
turns.zh: 不是，一点点弄的，免得被人发现。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And the cake? Who made that?
turns.zh: 那蛋糕呢？谁做的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My sister. She is good at cakes.
turns.zh: 我妹妹。她做蛋糕很在行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: She kept quiet too? That is hard.
turns.zh: 她也守口如瓶？真不容易。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We all did that. It was the work of all of us.
turns.zh: 我们都这样做了。这是我们所有人的工作。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am touched. You went to such trouble.
turns.zh: 我很感动。你们费了这么大劲。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are good. Now let us be happy.
turns.zh: 你很好。现在咱们开心吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I still can't get over it. How did you keep it secret?
turns.zh: 我还是缓不过来。你们怎么瞒住的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We had a secret group and only talked when you were not about.
turns.zh: 我们建了个秘密群，只在你不在的时候聊。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And no one let slip? Not even a word?
turns.zh: 没人说漏嘴？一个字都没漏？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not a word. We were all very safe.
turns.zh: 一个字都没有。我们都很小心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am surprised. You are all such good friends.
turns.zh: 我真服了。你们都是这么好的朋友。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is what friends do. Now come and see your presents.
turns.zh: 朋友就该这样。快来看看你的礼物。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, there are so many! Which one do I open first?
turns.zh: 哦，这么多！我先拆哪个？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Start with the great one. It is from all of us.
turns.zh: 先拆那个大的。那是我们大家送的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This is too much. You did not have to do all this.
turns.zh: 这也太隆重了。你们不必这样的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We were happy to. Now be quiet and open it!
turns.zh: 我们乐意。别说了，快拆开吧！

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All right, all right. I will open it.
turns.zh: 好好好，我拆就是。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go soft on the paper. Do not make holes in it.
turns.zh: 对纸轻点，别弄出洞来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Why? Would you like to keep it?
turns.zh: 怎么？你还想留着？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I might use it again for another present.
turns.zh: 可能下次包礼物还能用。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are a wise one. Here goes... Oh!
turns.zh: 你真会过日子。那我拆了……哦！

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you like it? We thought you would.
turns.zh: 喜欢吗？我们猜你会喜欢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the book I was after! How did you see that?
turns.zh: 这是我一直想要的那本书！你怎么知道的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Your sister let it out. She is not as safe as us.
turns.zh: 你姐说漏嘴了。她可没我们这么小心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have to give her a talking-to after.
turns.zh: 回头我得说说她。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Be kind. She only had a desire to help.
turns.zh: 别这么说，她也是想帮忙。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I still can't get over it. How did you keep it quiet?
turns.zh: 我还是没缓过来。你们怎么瞒得这么好？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We had a secret group. You did not look at my box.
turns.zh: 我们建了个秘密群。你从不看我手机。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is true. I am not one to look at things of others.
turns.zh: 那倒是。我不是那种看别人东西的人。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is why it worked. You are too good a man.
turns.zh: 所以才能成。你人太好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So every time I came, you were not here?
turns.zh: 所以我每次来，你们都不在？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, past the curtain. It was a bit of a laugh.
turns.zh: 对，窗帘那边。还挺好玩的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I saw the curtain move one time. I thought it was the wind.
turns.zh: 我确实有次看到窗帘动了一下。还以为是风。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That was me. I almost gave it away.
turns.zh: 那是我。差点露馅了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, you did well in the end. I am very happy.
turns.zh: 不过最后还是成功了。我很开心。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all. Happy day, friend.
turns.zh: 那就够了。生日快乐，兄弟。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep this day in mind.
turns.zh: 我会把今天记在心里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now come, let us have cake.
turns.zh: 好。来吧，我们切蛋糕。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is that a sweet brown one?
turns.zh: 那是甜棕色的吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the one you like best. I made it.
turns.zh: 对，你最爱吃的。我做的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are a good cook. That is a happy chance.
turns.zh: 你厨艺真好。真是幸运。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not so good as you say. But it is all right.
turns.zh: 没你说的那么好。不过还行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get a plate for every person.
turns.zh: 我们给每人拿个盘子好吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I will get them from the back.
turns.zh: 好，我去后面拿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will cut the cake. It is a great one.
turns.zh: 我来切蛋糕。挺大的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. We have all day.
turns.zh: 慢慢来。我们有一整天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This is a great surprise. I did not see it coming.
turns.zh: 这真是个大大的惊喜。我完全没想到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We kept it secret for a week. Did you have any idea?
turns.zh: 我们保密了一周。你一点都没察觉吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not at all. You are good at keeping secrets.
turns.zh: 完全没有。你们真会保密。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We kept away when you came near the house.
turns.zh: 你走近房子时我们躲开了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is kind of you.
turns.zh: 你真好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are our friend. It is only right.
turns.zh: 你是我们的朋友。这是应该的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This day will keep with me.
turns.zh: 这一天我会记得。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now let us have some cake and play.
turns.zh: 现在我们来吃蛋糕、玩一玩吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, please. I am ready for a good time.
turns.zh: 好的。我准备好开心一场了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Happy day, old friend.
turns.zh: 生日快乐，老朋友。

storyBlurb: 推开门，满屋彩带和气球，朋友们齐声喊“生日快乐”！原来大家都记得今天是我的生日。
storyScript:
【开场·意外发现】周六下午，阳光斜斜地洒在乙家门口的台阶上。甲拎着背包，像往常一样推开门，却瞬间愣住了——客厅里挂满了彩色气球和亮闪闪的彩带，桌上摆着一个大蛋糕，旁边堆着包装精美的礼物。朋友们从沙发后、门后跳出来，齐声喊道：“生日快乐！”甲瞪大眼睛，嘴巴张成了O型，背包差点滑落。他完全没想到，今天会是这样的场景。

【进行·追问缘由】甲缓过神来，笑着摇头问：“你们这是……怎么回事？今天不是我生日啊。”乙走上前，拍了拍他的肩膀说：“怎么不是？你自己忙忘了，今天就是你的生日。我们早就策划好了，想给你一个惊喜。”甲挠了挠头，掏出手机一看日期，恍然大悟。他环顾四周，看着朋友们一张张笑脸，心里涌起一股暖流。

【进行·继续追问】甲还是有点不敢相信，追问：“你们什么时候准备的？我怎么一点都不知道？”乙指了指角落里的装饰箱，得意地说：“上周就开始准备了，还特意建了个群瞒着你。你每次路过我家，我们都躲在窗帘后面，生怕被你发现。”甲听了，忍不住笑出声来，眼眶却有点发热。他想起最近自己一直加班，连生日都忘了，朋友们却记得这么清楚。

【收束·接受结果】甲深深吸了一口气，笑着张开双臂，给了乙一个大大的拥抱。他转身对所有人说：“谢谢你们，我真的太意外了，也太开心了。”朋友们欢呼起来，拉着他切蛋糕、拆礼物。客厅里充满了欢声笑语，彩带在灯光下闪闪发光。甲看着这一切，心里暖暖的，他知道，这就是最好的生日礼物。
